summary: Promoted ADR 0300 into canonical mainline truth as repository version `0.178.0` and platform version `0.130.96` after rebasing onto the latest realistic `origin/main` baseline at repository version `0.177.152` and platform version `0.130.95`, restoring the runtime-control NATS fan-out and streams, replaying Falco across docker-runtime-lv3, docker-build-lv3, monitoring-lv3, and postgres-lv3, and verifying four-host NATS, ntfy, Loki, and mutation-audit delivery.

verification.check: Protected-surface cut to canonical mainline truth
verification.observed: The release-manager closeout preserved the real repo-level correction path instead of hiding it: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0300-mainline-release-manager-r1-0.178.0.txt` records the first block on stale ws-0340 registry metadata, `...-r2-0.178.0.txt` records the second block after canonical-truth was pre-marked as already released, and `...-r3-0.178.0.txt` records the successful protected-surface write for repository version `0.178.0` before the external Outline sync failed with `502`.

verification.check: Latest-main JetStream recovery and stream restoration
verification.observed: After rebasing onto the latest realistic `origin/main`, `make live-apply-service service=nats-jetstream env=production` completed successfully on `runtime-control-lv3`, including the shared restic post-hook, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0300-live-apply-nats-jetstream-r4-after-rebase.txt`. The follow-up `make apply-nats-streams` recreated `PLATFORM_EVENTS`, `RAG_DOCUMENT`, and `SECRET_ROTATION`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0300-apply-nats-streams-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Latest-main Falco replay across the governed guests
verification.observed: `make converge-falco env=production` completed successfully across `docker-runtime-lv3`, `docker-build-lv3`, `monitoring-lv3`, and `postgres-lv3`; the final recap preserved `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=209 changed=7 failed=0 rescued=1`, `docker-build-lv3 : ok=61 changed=1 failed=0`, `monitoring-lv3 : ok=61 changed=1 failed=0`, and `postgres-lv3 : ok=47 changed=1 failed=0`, preserving the live Docker nat-chain rescue on `docker-runtime-lv3` in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0300-converge-falco-mainline-r5-after-nats.txt`.

verification.check: Four-host NATS, ntfy, Loki, and mutation-audit smoke verification
verification.observed: The smoke verifier confirmed `docker-build-lv3`, `docker-runtime-lv3`, `monitoring-lv3`, and `postgres-lv3` in the health, trigger, NATS, ntfy, Loki, and mutation-audit result sets, with bridge source IPs `10.10.10.30`, `10.10.10.40`, `10.10.10.50`, and `127.0.0.1`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0300-smoke-r3-after-nats.json`.

The released tree reran the focused pytest slice, live-apply receipt validation, full `make validate`, and the pre-push gate before merge; the resulting evidence is preserved under `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0300-mainline-*` together with the generated release notes, README, platform manifest, and restic receipts.

notes: This receipt is the canonical proof for ADR 0300 on repository version `0.178.0` and platform version `0.130.96`.
The first two release-manager runs are intentionally preserved because they exposed real repository truth drift on the latest realistic mainline before the successful protected-surface write.
The successful release-manager run still preserves the external Outline `502`, but the repository-local protected surfaces were already written correctly before that external dependency failed.

The latest-main nats-jetstream replay also refreshed the governed restic snapshot receipts; `falco_overrides` remains intentionally inactive because that optional backup source is not present on the runtime host.

correction_loop.surface: latest-main Falco warning path and protected-surface release closeout
correction_loop.repair_action: Aligned the Falco bridge and controller-side NATS tunnel with `runtime-control-lv3`, replayed the nats-jetstream service and stream definitions, captured the four-host smoke proof, corrected stale ws-0340 release-blocker metadata plus pending-release canonical-truth fields, and reran the release manager until the repository-local protected surfaces were written successfully.
